recommendations.title: Waiting for "Superman"
recommendations.overview: Gripping, heartbreaking, and ultimately hopeful, Waiting for Superman is an impassioned indictment of the American school system from An Inconvenient Truth director Davis Guggenheim.

recommendations.title: An Inconvenient Truth
recommendations.overview: A documentary on Al Gore's campaign to make the issue of global warming a recognized problem worldwide.

recommendations.title: STILL: A Michael J. Fox Movie
recommendations.overview: A short kid from a Canadian army base becomes the international pop culture darling of the 1980s—only to find the course of his life altered by a stunning diagnosis. What happens when an incurable optimist confronts an incurable disease?

recommendations.title: It Might Get Loud
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the electric guitar from the point of view of three significant rock musicians: the Edge, Jimmy Page and Jack White.

recommendations.title: Gossip
recommendations.overview: For a class project, three college students decide to invent an unfounded rumor about the most popular girl on campus. But as the rumor spreads, it begins to spiral out of control.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Bowling for Columbine
recommendations.overview: This is not a film about gun control. It is a film about the fearful heart and soul of the United States, and the 280 million Americans lucky enough to have the right to a constitutionally protected Uzi. From a look at the Columbine High School secur

recommendations.title: The Quintessential Quintuplets Movie
recommendations.overview: When five lovely young girls who hate studying hire part-time tutor Futaro, he guides not only their education but also their hearts. Time spent has brought them all closer, with feelings growing within the girls and Futaro. As they finish their thir

recommendations.title: The Breadwinner
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young girl in Afghanistan, ruled by the Taliban, disguises herself as a boy in order to provide for her family.

recommendations.title: Powaqqatsi
recommendations.overview: An exploration of technologically developing nations and the effect the transition to Western-style modernization has had on them.
